## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New artifacts implemented; articles to be tagged for easy identification](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Content overfitting to specific niches; need to broaden focus for general audience](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [SEO-driven topics added to content pipeline; reorganization needed for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Stablecoin and LATAM expansion content strategies discussed; low initial SEO potential noted](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Targeting

  - [Articles using new artifacts overfitting to specific niches (e.g., high-risk, marketplaces)](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Need to broaden focus for general audience, except for specific content buckets](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Differentiation strategies to be revised, focusing less on narrow targeting](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Suggestion: Create foundation articles, then narrow-focus follow-ups (e.g., general partial authorization article, then industry-specific versions)](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Content Pipeline and Review Process

  - [SEO-driven topics added to queue; visible in Assignments tab](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Mark requested reorganization similar to initial content bucket process](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [New Airtable view for Stablecoin/LATAM topics praised for ease of use](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Similar view to be created for new SEO-driven topics](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

### Performance Update

  - [Slight drop in sessions, but non-branded performance steadily increasing](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Google traffic up, Bing and LLM referrals down](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Payment security and fraud prevention clusters saw a drop](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Refreshing old content expected to boost performance](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

### Stablecoin and LATAM Expansion Content

  - [Two separate topics: Stablecoin for settlements/payouts, APAC merchants expanding to LATAM](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Low initial SEO potential for stablecoin content due to current search landscape](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Strategy: Publish content, measure engagement, and refine based on data and sales team input](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tag articles using new artifacts for easy identification](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Reorganize SEO-driven topics into content buckets for review](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Create new Airtable view for SEO-driven topics, similar to Stablecoin/LATAM view](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Revise content targeting approach to broaden focus for general audience](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Mark to review Stablecoin/LATAM topics and add APAC to LATAM use case](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [GrowthX to add notes in Airtable indicating changes in targeting approach](https://fathom.video/share/eJbCGoYu79M3p11dSsFh_tJUCx3zrKJ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
